message:
fix: add dedicated Dolt health check ticker (30s) separate from 3min heartbeat

Dolt server crashes could go undetected for up to 3 minutes because
EnsureRunning() only ran inside the general heartbeat loop. Add a
dedicated ticker (default 30s) for Dolt health checks, reducing worst-
case detection time from 3 minutes to 30 seconds. The full heartbeat
still runs Dolt checks as belt-and-suspenders.

Configurable via DoltServerConfig.HealthCheckInterval. (gt-vu91a8)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
